sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101118" key="sunu/peimi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνύπειμι</orth>, (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εὶμί</itype> <sense id="n101118.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sum</tr_>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be in</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">under together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1545.tlg001:2:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ocell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.22</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1545.tlg001:3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
